summary: Classified the business-evidence family as clean. Delivered roles get a readable evidence surface, and even higher-permission roles remain effectively read-only at runtime because the model is immutable outside controlled mutation contexts.

notes: The evidence family is effectively read-only at runtime.
No new action-to-model mismatch was found.
Evidence production and exception engines remain out of scope.

next_step: Continue the non-first-batch objective by selecting another uncovered secondary-flow family.
